title: Dawnfall
description: Dawnfall is a Hardcore Minecraft Experience with a Vanilla+ feeling.
body:
![about the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd3af2921c3f774074b6b1283376cfe7185e79f_0.webp)
Dawnfall is a Hardcore Minecraft Modpack with Punishing gameplay and **Perma-Death**, The Modpack doesn't add too many new content to the game, but it changes and overhauls most of the vanilla features of the game.

### Main Features
**Biome and Dimensions Overhaul**, most of the biomes have been changed and in addition it adds new biomes to all the dimensions and the overworld.

**Enchantments**, The enchantment system has seen an overhaul that makes it easier to enchant and it comes with new enchantments as well :3

**Hardcore**, the game is locked in the hardcore difficulty and health regen has been disabled, but to keep things balanced you can heal up by using campfires, sleeping and using golden apples

More Content will be added in future updates
